debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
⊢ ¬5 ∣ ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (2 * n + 1).choose (2 * k + 1) * 2 ^ (3 * k)

failed_attempts:
intro h
  let S : ZMod 5 := ∑ k ∈ range (n + 1), (2 * n + 1).choose (2 * k + 1) * 2 ^ (3 * k)
  have hS : S = 0 := by
    rw [← ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at h
    convert h using 2 with k
    simp [S, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_pow]
    ring_nf; rfl

  let M : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![1, 3; 1, 1]
  let J : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![0, 3; 1, 0]
  have hM : M = 1 + J := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [M, J, one_apply] <;> rfl
  have hJ2 : J ^ 2 = 3 • 1 := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [J, Matrix.mul_apply, one_apply] <;> rfl

  have h_pow : (M ^ (2 * n + 1)) 1 0 = S := by
    rw [hM, add_pow, Matrix.sum_apply]
    rw [← sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not (range (2 * n + 2)) (Odd)]
    have h_even : ∀ k ∈ filter (λ k => ¬ Odd k) (range (2 * n + 2)), ((2 * n + 1).choose k : ZMod 5) * (J ^ k) 1 0 = 0 := by
      intro k hk
      rw [mem_filter] at hk
      obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := (not_odd_iff.mp hk.2)
      rw [hm, pow_mul, hJ2, pow_mul]
      simp
    rw [sum_eq_zero h_even, zero_add]
    apply sum_bij (λ k _ => 2 * k + 1)
    · intro k hk; rw [mem_range] at hk ⊢; linarith
    · intro k hk; simp [mem_filter, mem_range]; constructor; linarith; use k; rfl
    · intro k hk
      have : J ^ (2 * k + 1) = (3 : ZMod 5) ^ k • J := by
        rw [pow_add, pow_mul, hJ2]; simp; rfl
      rw [this, Matrix.smul_apply]; simp [J]; ring_nf; rfl
    · intro i j _ _ h; linarith
    · intro b hb; rw [mem_filter, mem_range] at hb
      obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hb.2
      use k; simp [mem_range]; linarith

  rw [hS] at h_pow

  let A := M ^ (2 * n + 1)
  have comm : Commute A J := Commute.pow_left (by rw [hM]; apply Commute.add_right; rfl) _
  have hA_scalar : ∃ a, A = a • 1 := by
    have c_eq := comm.eq
    have A10 : A 1 0 = 0 := h_pow
    have A01 : A 0 1 = 0 := by
      replace c_eq := Matrix.ext_iff.mp c_eq 0 0
      simp [Matrix.mul_apply, J] at c_eq
      rw [A10] at c_eq; simp at c_eq; exact c_eq.symm
    have A00_eq_A11 : A 0 0 = A 1 1 := by
      replace c_eq := Matrix.ext_iff.mp c_eq 1 0
      simp [Matrix.mul_apply, J] at c_eq
      rw [A10, A01] at c_eq; simp at c_eq
      apply mul_left_cancel₀ (show (3 : ZMod 5) ≠ 0 by decide) c_eq
    use A 0 0
    ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [one_apply]
    · rfl
    · assumption
    · assumption
    · assumption

  obtain ⟨a, rfl⟩ := hA_scalar
  have h_det : (a • (1 : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5))).det = 3 ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
    rw [← Matrix.det_pow]
    congr; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [M] <;> rfl
  rw [Matrix.det_smul, Matrix.det_one, mul_one] at h_det
  simp only [Fintype.card_fin] at h_det
  
  have is_sq : IsSquare (3 : ZMod 5) := by
    use a * (3 ^ n)⁻¹
    field_simp
    rw [← sq, mul_pow, ← h_det]
    ring_nf
    rw [pow_succ', pow_mul, sq]
  
  have not_sq : ¬ IsSquare (3 : ZMod 5) := by
    intro ⟨x, hx⟩
    revert hx
    decide

  contradiction
